## What

Brief description of the change and the problem it solves.

## How verified

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Manual check (which command / TUI screen):

## Notes

- CLI/TUI surface changes update `--help`, the README, and the regression tests.
- User-facing changes are noted in `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
